fixes_applied: In MaterialSearch.tsx, changed group header name derivation from materialDisplayName(group.items) to use group.title with a safe fallback to first item and a default unknown label, fixing MaterialLike array argument mismatch.
Made MaterialPairSection tolerate existing prop names and made missing-label text resilient with default labels to match prior callsite fields.
Removed unused MaterialAssetSlot props videoRef and forceShowMissingAsClip from the component contract and stopped passing them from MaterialPairSection.
Removed now-unused MaterialPairSection ref props (firstClipRef/thirdClipRef) after those references were removed from MaterialAssetSlot.
Expanded materialObjectLabel to accept string values and normalized calls to avoid passing undefined into the helper.
final_build_result: PASS: npm run build completed successfully (tsc + vite build), production bundle generated.
behavior_changes: No behavior changes to ExperimentSegments/analysis logic were introduced; build-fix-only cleanup in MaterialSearch view props and type normalization, with no algorithmic/pipeline changes.
remaining_risks: Minimal: helper signature widened to accept string inputs for material object labeling; verify this path still maps labels as expected with full regression tests if needed.
